authors: Austriac Department of Media and Communications
raw_title: Scanning vs. Thorough Processing the News: Antecedents of First- and Second-Level Incidental Exposure and the Role of the Relevance Appraisal
title_en: Scanning vs. Thorough Processing the News: Antecedents of First- and Second-Level Incidental Exposure and the Role of the Relevance Appraisal
title_zh: 新闻浏览与深度处理：第一级和第二级偶然暴露的前因及相关性评估的作用
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了人们如何以不同方式接触新闻：快速浏览或深入阅读。它研究了为什么人们会偶然看到新闻（第一级暴露）以及为什么会进一步关注这些新闻（第二级暴露），并分析了个人如何判断新闻是否相关。
plain_summary_en: This study examines how people encounter news in different ways: through quick scanning or thorough reading. It investigates why people accidentally come across news (first-level exposure) and why they pay further attention to it (second-level exposure), and analyzes how individuals judge whether news is relevant to them.
research_direction_zh: 数字新闻环境下的信息处理与偶然暴露机制研究
research_direction_en: Research on information processing and incidental exposure mechanisms in digital journalism environments
